purpose: Exact, ready-to-execute specification for producing Archer Attack v3 via pose-guided image generation / rigged key-pose reconstruction. Created because this execution environment has no pose-generation capability (PIL+numpy only; no diffusion/inpainting/rigging/pose-estimation tools). Hand this package to a pose-capable pipeline or artist; import the resulting frames with the validation plan below.

environmentCapabilityAudit.conclusion: Cannot synthesize genuinely new limb poses here. Per v2 root-cause analysis (docs/reviews/archer-v2-defect-analysis/), deterministic displacement large enough to read as a draw is exactly what tears the bow; smaller displacement collapses to a static pose. STOP-and-handoff is the mandated path.

lineage.attackV2Status: REJECTED by human review (FAIL, torn-bow defect frames 002-004; no real draw motion beneath). Preserved as evidence in PR #72. Do NOT reuse v2 draw-phase pixels.

identitySourceAssets.role: SECONDARY clean raise-pose reference (undamaged v2 frame; bow + grip readable)

canvasContract.mode: 8-bit RGBA PNG, non-interlaced, fully transparent background
canvasContract.rootMotion: in-place (no world travel baked into frames)
canvasContract.facingConvention: character faces viewer/slightly right as in Neutral Master; runtime mirrors via flipX
canvasContract.feetPolicy: Feet planted, same stance and baseline y=854 as Neutral Master throughout. NOTE: v2's byte-identical y>=800 pin is NOT required for generated frames (a real draw shifts weight slightly); the v3 validator must instead verify foot baseline within +/-6 px and no foot slide. This is an explicit, documented contract change, not a silent relaxation.

identityConstraints: SAME character: young elf archer, chibi proportions (large head ~1/3 height)
Face: large green eyes, confident brow, small smile — identical to Neutral Master
Hood: green hood with ornate gold trim and gold leaf crest, worn up
Ears: long pointed elf ears visible through/beside hood
Costume: green tunic/dress with gold filigree edging, brown belts with gold star buckles, side pouch, green boots with gold armor trim, dark-green cape
Quiver: on character's left hip/back with green-fletched arrows
Bow: ornate golden recurve bow with green inlay, distinctive curved blade-like limb tips — EXACT same design
Palette: same greens/golds/browns; no hue shift
Style: same painted chibi rendering, same lighting direction, same outline weight
negativeConstraints: NO costume, color, or bow redesign
NO added VFX (glow, trails, arrows in flight, motion blur) baked into frames
NO torn/fragmented bow, NO floating limbs, NO missing hands (v2 failure mode)
NO near-duplicate frames across the draw phase (v1/v2 failure mode)
NO baked-in ground shadow beyond what Neutral Master has

framePlan.fpsPolicy: 12 FPS default; producer may deliver at 10-15 FPS if motion reads better, but MUST state the actual FPS so the sidecar records truth

frames.name: Ready / Pre-Nock
frames.spec: Neutral-adjacent stance; bow in left hand angled up ~20-30deg from rest, right hand reaching toward quiver/string. Must clearly differ from pure Neutral but read as 'about to shoot'.

frames.name: Nock
frames.spec: Bow raised toward horizontal; right hand at string nocking an arrow; head/eyes toward target (viewer-right).

frames.name: Raise
frames.spec: Bow arm (left) extending toward target, bow near vertical in profile; right hand gripping string at chest height; shoulders rotating into archery stance.

frames.name: Mid Draw
frames.spec: Left arm extended; right hand pulling string visibly back ~30-40% draw, right elbow bending up/back; bow limbs beginning to flex; torso leans slightly.

frames.name: Deep Draw
frames.spec: String pulled ~70%; right hand near jaw line; right elbow high; bow visibly flexed; cape/hair may swing slightly for energy.

frames.name: Full Draw (climax)
frames.spec: MUST be the most distinct silhouette: left arm fully extended, right hand anchored at cheek, string at maximum draw, bow at maximum flex, arrow level. Readable even at 120x180 px.

frames.name: Release
frames.spec: String snapped forward (straight), right hand opened and moved back past cheek in follow-through, bow limbs sprung straight; NO arrow visible (projectile is runtime-spawned). Sharpest single-frame change in the sequence.

frames.name: Follow-through
frames.spec: Right arm relaxing down/back; bow arm easing; body weight settling forward slightly.

frames.name: Recovery
frames.spec: Bow lowering toward rest position; right hand returning toward side; approaching Neutral silhouette.

frames.name: Neutral exit
frames.spec: Match approved Neutral Master pose as closely as generation allows. If the producer can emit the EXACT Neutral Master file byte-identically, do so; otherwise deliver the closest generated match and the importer will decide whether to substitute the byte-exact Neutral Master (documented decision at import).

framePlan.holdPolicy: An intentional 1-frame hold at Full Draw (pose D) is acceptable if delivered as a genuinely re-rendered near-identical frame or explicitly declared as a hold; accidental byte-duplicate hashes are rejected.

releaseEvent.policy: Bind to the ACTUAL visual release frame of the delivered sequence (expected index 6 under this plan, normalizedTime ~0.65 at 10 frames). Do NOT blindly copy v2's frame-5/0.55 values. Importer must set frameIndex + normalizedTime from the delivered frames and record visual reasoning.

steps: Verify 10 RGBA 640x960 non-interlaced PNGs named per pattern
SHA-256 every frame; reject accidental duplicate hashes (declared holds exempted only if visually justified)
Alpha bounds within alphaSafeBounds; zero non-transparent border pixels
Foot baseline within +/-6 px of y=854 across frames; no horizontal foot slide beyond +/-4 px

Draw progression: adjacent-frame premultiplied-MAE must show a progression structure (rise into full draw, spike at release, decay through recovery). Thresholds must be DERIVED from the delivered frames' honest measurement and justified in writing — never tuned to force PASS, never blind-copied from v2.
Identity check: human visual comparison against Neutral Master (face/hood/bow/palette) — automated metrics cannot approve identity
Source-map: per-frame SHA-256 + provenance to this handoff package ID
All approval flags remain false pending human visual PASS + exact-file approval workflow

approvalFlags.rule: None of these may be set true by the producer or importer. Human visual PASS + exact-file approval workflow required.

resolutionOptions: Run this package through a pose-guided image-generation pipeline (image-to-image with pose control / controlled inpainting) outside this environment
Commission/produce the 10 frames manually per this spec
Deliver frames via the established user-supplied import pattern (as previously done for Archer motion-test and Golem attack frames), after which this repo's import validation plan executes
